title: Lar's Portion And The Poet's Part.
content:
At my homely country-seat
    I have there a little wheat,
    Which I work to meal, and make
    Therewithal a holy cake:
    Part of which I give to Lar,
    Part is my peculiar.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Lar's Portion And The Poet's Part.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
